itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar | Shikara Ride on Dal Lake | Houseboat Stay
itinerary.body:
Upon arrival at Srinagar Airport, you'll be transferred to the picturesque Dal Lake, surrounded by the breathtaking Himalayan peaks. Embark on a shikara ride, while taking in the mesmerizing views of vibrant floating gardens, houseboats, and the distant snow-capped mountains. Afterward, check in to your traditional houseboat, where you can relax while experiencing the Kashmiri hospitality with an overnight stay on the lake.

Dinner · Stay: Uno Grand · Transport: SUV

itinerary.title: Srinagar Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
Check out from your houseboat and get driven to your hotel in Srinagar. Post check in, get driven for a city tour, starting with the famous Mughal gardens. Stroll through Nishat Bagh, where terraced lawns overlook Dal Lake with stunning views of the Zabarwan mountains. Next, visit other sites like Chashme Shahi, a royal spring garden & the ancient Shankaracharya Temple, offering panoramic views of the city. Later, explore the bustling markets of Lal Chowk before being driven back to the hotel.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Check-in at Standard Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to Sonmarg
itinerary.body:
In the morning, get transferred for a day trip to Sonmarg. From Thajiwas Pony Stand, you can take a horse ride to the Thajiwas Glacier viewpoint, surrounded by lush meadows, streams, and the majestic Himalayas. If time permits, you can visit the stunning Krishnasar Lake with its crystal-clear waters reflecting the mountains, or opt for an exciting rafting experience on the Sindh River (at an additional cost). From pony stand, you'll be driven back to the hotel.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Srinagar · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

Discover the breathtaking beauty of Aru Valley, Betaab Valley, and Chandanwari, known for their stunning landscapes and serene surroundings. After your visit, return to the cab stand on your own and then get transferred back to your hotel for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Day at Leisure in Pahalgam
itinerary.body:
Spend the day at leisure, either relaxing at your hotel or exploring the charming town of Pahalgam at your own pace. You can visit attractions like Poshwan Park, offering peaceful green spaces or the scenic Baisaran Valley, often called "Mini Switzerland" for its lush meadows. You can also take a trip to the Tulian Lake or enjoy a fun-filled day at Lidder Amusement Park. For adventure enthusiasts, rafting on the Lidder River is also an option. Later, return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

itinerary.body:
After checking out, you’ll be transferred to your hotel in Gulmarg. Once you check in, the rest of the day is yours to enjoy at leisure. You can explore nearby attractions like the Gulmarg Children’s Park, perfect for a relaxing stroll, the historic Maharani Temple, or the peaceful Shrine of Baba Reshi. Additionally, you can take a day trip to the Gulmarg Biosphere Reserve to discover its rich flora and fauna. Later, return to your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

title: Unforgettable Kashmir Honeymoon Special
description: Experience the Unforgettable Kashmir Honeymoon Special with romantic houseboat stays, Gulmarg adventures, Dal Lake Shikara rides, and scenic Himalayan escapes.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar | Welcome to the Land of Divine Love
itinerary.body:
On reaching Srinagar, meet a representative who will transfer to your hotel.
Complete the check-in formalities and relax for some time and then proceed for a tour to the beautiful city of Srinagar.
Begin by seeking the blessing of Lord Shiva at his oldest shrine in Kashmir valley - the Shankaracharya Temple.
Walk hand-in-hand with your partner as you explore the famous Mughal Gardens - The Nishat Bagh meaning the garden of pleasure and The Shalimar Bagh which means Abode of love.
Visit the Chashma Shahi which is a natural spring that adds to the beauty of these Royal Gardens.
End the day as you take a leisurely stroll around the beautiful Dal Lake.
Return back for delicious dinner and overnight stay at the Hotel in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Sonamarg | Explore the Famous Golden Meadows
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning, have a scrumptious breakfast at the hotel with a beautiful view of Dal Lake.
Post breakfast, prepare yourself for the ultimate adventure to Sonamarg.
Embark on a full-day excursion to the picturesque 'meadow of gold’ Sonmarg
En route to Sonamarg, take a halt at beautiful spots and enjoy the scenic view and natural beauty.
On arrival at Sonamarg, you can ride on a horse to visit Thajiwas Glacier where snow remains round the year. 
You can also enjoy the most popular sports activities like white water rafting here in Sonamarg.
Once done exploring Sonamarg, drive back to your hotel in Srinagar.
Enjoy an overnight stay and dinner at the hotel in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Pahalgam | Take Romantic Stroll in the Town Adorned with the Best of Scenery that Nature has to Offer
itinerary.body:
After having a heaty breakfast, check out from the hotel.
En route to Pahalgam, Visit Awantipura ruins and seek the blessings of Lord Vishnu from an 1100-year-old temple.
On reaching Pahalgam, check into the hotel and head out for local sightseeing.
Pahalgam with its lovely meadows, gurgling streams, apple orchards and a variety of trees, from pine to deodar, resembles a marvellous portrait.
Walk hand in hand through the charming meadows to reach a small hamlet of Baisaren which is set in the pine and fir forest and offers the best views in Kashmir.
Return back to the hotel for dinner.
Overnight stay in Pahalgam.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar | Enjoy the Sky Changing its Colours during sunset at the Dal Lake
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning, have your breakfast, complete the check-out formalities and leave from Pahalgam to Srinagar.
Upon arrival at Srinagar, you will be transferred to a beautiful houseboat floating quietly on the crystal clear waters of Dal lake.
Enjoy some time admiring the beautiful views of the surroundings from your houseboat.
After having some rest, you can go on a shopping spree at the busting Lal Chowk where you can buy leather goods, embroidered mats and carpets, antique jewellery and the highly demanded Pashmina shawls.
In the evening, enjoy a romantic 'Shikhara ride' at Dal Lake overlooking a beautiful sunset.
You can then return back to your houseboat for a romantic meal and an overnight stay in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Gulmarg | Admire the Appealing Panoramic View from Asia's Highest Cable Car
itinerary.body:
Begin your day early with a delicious breakfast and prepare for upcoming adventures.
Proceed to Gulmarg, primarily famous for ski slopes and natural 18 holes golf course, which is also the highest golf course in the world. 
As you drive towards Gulmarg you can enjoy the splendour of nature and the snowy mountains that accompany you throughout the journey.
Once you reach Gulmarg, the most essential thing is to go on the Gondola ride (cable car) from Gulmarg to Kongdoori and Marry Shoulder.
Enjoy the panoramic views floating above the valley and witness nature slowly unveiling its hidden beauty as you rise higher in the cable car.
In the evening, drive back to Srinagar where you can check in to a beautiful houseboat rocking to the gentle waves of Dal Lake.
Overnight stay and a romantic dinner at the houseboat in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Departure from Srinagar | It's Time to Say Goodbye to the Paradise on Earth
itinerary.body:
Wake up, have a sumptuous breakfast and pack your bags.
Check out from the houseboat and reach your desired drop off point in Srinagar.
Head back home with a bundle of lovely memories from the mountains.

title: Srinagar & Vaishno Devi Grand Tour
description: Discover the beauty of Kashmir and the divine Vaishno Devi Yatra with Srinagar sightseeing, houseboat stays, and Himalayan views.

itinerary.title: Experience the perfect blend of spirituality, natural beauty, and Himalayan charm with the unforgettable Srinagar & Vaishno Devi Grand Tour. This specially crafted Kashmir Vaishno Devi tour takes you through breathtaking valleys, sacred temples, snow-covered mountains, serene lakes, and iconic attractions, creating a memorable journey through the heart of North India. Explore the mesmerizing beauty of Kashmir, famously known as the “Paradise on Earth,” where lush green valleys, crystal-clear lakes, snow-capped mountains, and scenic landscapes create the perfect escape into nature. Visit beautiful destinations like Srinagar and nearby Himalayan attractions while experiencing the peaceful charm of the region. Embark on the sacred journey to Vaishno Devi Temple, one of India’s most revered Shaktipeeths. Seek blessings from Maa Vaishno Devi and discover the spiritual significance of the holy three Pindis, attracting millions of devotees every year on this divine pilgrimage. Discover the breathtaking beauty of Betaab Valley, a picturesque destination named after the famous Bollywood movie “Betaab.” Surrounded by lush meadows, pine forests, rivers, and snow-covered mountains, this valley offers stunning views and unforgettable sightseeing experiences. Visit the scenic Drung Waterfall, known for its cascading waters flowing down rocky cliffs amidst beautiful greenery and Himalayan landscapes. This hidden natural gem offers breathtaking photography opportunities and peaceful surroundings. Experience the adventure of trekking to the stunning Thajiwas Glacier, where pristine snowfields and majestic Himalayan peaks create a magical winter wonderland. The glacier’s breathtaking landscapes and fresh mountain air make it one of the most memorable experiences of this journey. This Srinagar and Vaishno Devi grand tour package perfectly combines spirituality, scenic beauty, adventure, and relaxation. From sacred temple visits and peaceful valleys to glaciers, waterfalls, and breathtaking Himalayan landscapes, every moment of this Kashmir tour with Vaishno Devi darshan and Srinagar promises unforgettable memories and soulful experiences.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar | Welcome to The Paradise on Earth
itinerary.body:
Meet a representative at a pre-decided pickup point in Srinagar and get transferred to a beautiful houseboat at Dal Lake.
Complete the check-in formalities, rest for some time in your houseboat.
Enjoy a leisure day in the houseboat witnessing the alluring beauty around and the silent waves of Dal lake.
You can also embark on a Shikara Ride upon the rolling waters of Dal Lake.
Overnight stay in Houseboat in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing in Srinagar | Walk the Beautiful Mughal Gardens with a Variety of Colourful Flowers
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning, have your breakfast and checkout from the houseboat.
Complete the check-in formalities at a pre-booked luxury hotel in Srinagar.
Visit the world-famous Mughal Baghs including the Nishant Bagh (The garden of Pleasure) and Shalimar Garden (Abode of love) and also visit Chashma Shahi, Indira Gandhi Memorial, Tulip Garden and Shankaracharya Temple.
In the evening, you can go on a shopping spree at the busting Lal Chowk to buy products such as leather goods, embroidered mats and carpets, antique jewellery and the highly demanded Pashmina shawl.
Overnight stay in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Sonamarg | Walk Around the Famed Golden Meadows
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning, have a scrumptious breakfast at the hotel with a beautiful view of the Dal Lake.
Post breakfast, embark on a full-day excursion to the picturesque 'Meadow of Gold’, Sonmarg.
En route to Sonamarg, take a halt at various beautiful spots and enjoy the scenic views and natural beauty.
On arrival at Sonamarg, you can ride on a horse to visit Thajiwas Glacier where snow remains round the year. 
You can also enjoy the most popular sports activities like white water rafting here in Sonamarg.
Once done exploring Sonamarg drive back to Srinagar to your hotel.
Overnight stay in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Pahalgam | A Quiet Little Town Adorned with a blanket of Pine Trees and Crystal-Clear Rivers
itinerary.body:
Wake up to a fabulous view of the snow-capped mountains, enjoy a hearty breakfast and complete the check-out formalities from the hotel.
Post the breakfast, start your drive towards Pahalgam that is also known as the Valley of Shepherds.
On arrival at Pahalgam, complete the check-in formalities and rest for some time.
Visit the Aru Valley, a small village located 11km from Pahalgam, which is famous for its scenic beauty and various adventure activities.
Visit Betaab Valley and Lidder River, the most popular tourist destination and enjoy their natural charm.
Further, you will be taken to Chandanwari, which is near Betaab Valley and is surrounded by stunning snow-capped mountains.
After a beautiful sightseeing tour, return back to the hotel in Pahalgam for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam to Gulmarg | Spend a Romantic Day in the Flower Scented Meadows
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning, have a hearty breakfast, complete the check out formalities at the hotel and get ready to explore Gulmarg.
You will come across the paddy fields and rice fields on the way to Gulmarg.
On arrival at Gulmarg, complete the check-in formalities at the hotel and take some rest.
The rest of the day is at leisure and you can head out to explore the beautiful surroundings of the hotel.
Later in the evening return back to your hotel for dinner.
Overnight stay in Gulmarg.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing in Gulmarg | Embark on the Highest Gondola Ride in Asia
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning to the alluring snow-capped mountains, have breakfast and head out to explore Gulmarg.
Visit Gulmarg Gondola, which is the prime attraction over here and enjoy a cable car ride that offers panoramic views of high mountains covered in snow.
Gulmarg is a famous ski resort as well and you too can proceed to learn skiing.
Enjoy activities such as golf, nature walks, bird watching and pony rides and visit the Maharani Temple and Ziarat of Baba Reshi or try zorbing at the Children’s Park.
Overnight stay in Gulmarg.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg to Srinagar and Departure | Bid Farewell to The City of Lakes
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning to a beautiful view of the mountains, enjoy a wholesome breakfast and check out from the hotel.
Start your drive from Gulmarg to Srinagar.
Conclude the tour with beautiful memories on reaching your desired destination in Srinagar.
Note: As we'll be travelling from Gulmarg to Srinagar, we recommend that you book a flight from Srinagar after 2:00 PM if you are departing the same day.

title: Leh Ladakh Air Adventure Package
description: Experience the Leh Ladakh Air Adventure Package with Pangong Lake, Nubra Valley, scenic Himalayan landscapes, and unforgettable high-altitude adventures.

itinerary.title: Board Flight from Delhi to Leh | Welcome to the Top of the World
itinerary.body:
Board your flight from Delhi Airport to Leh.
After landing in Leh, get welcomed by a representative, who will help in smooth transfer to the hotel.
Upon reaching your hotel, complete the check-in formalities and spend a relaxing day getting proper rest.
Enjoy a hearty breakfast in the hotel and gradually get acclimatized to the climate.
Attend a short briefing and start your sightseeing in the evening by visiting the beautifully constructed Shanti Stupa, which was built to commemorate the 2500 years of Buddhism.
Visit the Leh Palace which was built in the 17th century that will give you an insight into the bygone golden era of Leh.
Later visit the local Leh Market to buy some Tibetan handicrafts or go cafe hopping to try the delicious Ladakhi cuisine.
Return back to the hotel for a lip-smacking dinner.
Overnight stay at the hotel in Leh.

Dinner · Stay: Uno Grand · Transport: SUV

itinerary.title: Leh to Sham Valley | Exploring Borders of Leh
itinerary.body:
Wake up to a beautiful morning in the mountains and have a hearty breakfast.
Get ready for an adventurous drive to 'Sham Valley', which is beautifully nestled around the Srinagar - Leh highway.
Start off the sightseeing by paying homage to the martyrs of the Indo-Pak War at the Hall of Fame.
Visit the Spituk Gompa which also has a museum on the premises housing ancient masks, weapons and Thangkas (Buddhist Paintings).
Enjoy delicious langar at Gurudwara Pathar Sahib and know the story behind the construction of this Gurudwara by the army.
Another interesting place to visit today is Magnetic Hill, a small stretch of the road that defies the law of gravity.
Visit Indus Sangam Viewpoint to watch the confluence of Zanskar and Indus Rivers.
Visit SECMOL which is the real 3-idiots school.
After a day filled with fun and adventure, return back to the hotel for dinner and an overnight stay in Leh.

itinerary.title: Day Leh to Khardung-la | A Drive to the World’s Highest Motorable Road (18000 ft.)
itinerary.body:
After having a healthy breakfast in the morning, get ready for the ultimate adventure.
This journey will take you through some of the highest passes in the world and will greet you with the ever-changing views of the barren land.
Take a stopover at the cafe on Khardung-La Pass, the world's highest all-season motorable road and soak in the views as you will feel like on top of the world.
After an amazing journey to Khardung La Pass, you can then head back to Leh.
Once back in Leh, enjoy leisure time to roam around at Mall Road buy souvenirs for your loved ones
Overnight stay at hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Leh to Pangong Lake | Recreate the Famous Bollywood Moments
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning and have a scrumptious breakfast.
Get ready for the most awaited day as you will be visiting Pangong Lake on the Indo-China border.
One of the highest altitude saline water lakes, Pangong Tso will greet you with its changing colours from shades of blue to green to red.
Spend some time exploring the surroundings of the Pangong Lake with the view of the Shyok river on one side and the mountains on another side.
You can also recreate some of the moments from your favourite Bollywood movies like 3-idiots and Jab Tak Hai Jaan and enjoy the place in Bollywood style.
On your way back to Leh, take a small stopover at the Chang-la Pass, which is one of the highest mountain passes in the world.
You can also visit the Chang-la Cafe, located just on the Changla Pass.
Visit the Changla Baba Temple on top, after which the pass got its name and is believed to be the guardian of the people visiting Chang La.
Further, visit the Druk Padma School, famed for the movie ‘3 Idiots’ as the site where the last scene was shot.
One can also visit the beautifully structured Thiksey Monastery and Shey Palace en-route, if time permits.
Upon reaching Leh, hed directly to your hotel.
Overnight stay at a hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Departure | It's Time to Say Goodbye to the Mountains
itinerary.body:
After having your breakfast in the morning, complete the check out formalities at the hotel.
Later, you will be transferred to the airport for your onwards journey.
Board your flight and fly out of Leh and say goodbye to your fellow travellers and this magical land.

This will be around a 12-hour journey.eck-in

itinerary.title: Manali To Jispa | Drive Through Atal Tunnel to Enter A Different World
itinerary.body:
Wake up to a beautiful morning in the mountains.
Have a lip-smacking breakfast before you start your journey towards Jispa.
On the way to Jispa, you will travel through the famous Atal Tunnel, one of the longest underground highways in the world.
Move ahead for Sissu and Keylong – the laid-back region where natural beauty remains untouched in its most pristine form.
Here you can explore the beautiful Sissu Lake and Sissu Waterfall.
Explore the lush green Bhaga valley, and then head over to Jispa.
Reach Jispa, which is truly rich in fascinating trails and lush green jungles.
Check in to the camp in Jispa and enjoy evening tea with snacks.
Overnight stay at camps in Jispa.

itinerary.title: Jispa To Sarchu Via Baralacha-la | A Night Under Starlit Sky
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning and have a healthy breakfast before you start your journey to Sarchu.
En route, visit Deepak Tal which acts as a mirror, reflecting the calm surroundings of the snow-capped peaks.
You can take a short stopover at the Zingzing Bar – one of the highest roadside bars in the world.
Stop by the Suraj Tal which literally translates to 'the lake of sun god' and seems like a green emerald set in the barren Himalayas drenched in mystery as well as splendour.
Your next stop is Baralacha La Pass, a picturesque mountain pass standing at 16000 feet, offering you some stunning vistas of the confluence of the 3 valleys.
Enjoy your lunch at Bharatpur tent colony or nearby area.
Reach Sarchu in the afternoon and rest for some time.
Later in the evening, enjoy the beautiful brown mountains and the amazing sunset right from your campsite.
Dinner and overnight stay at the camps in Sarchu.

itinerary.title: Sarchu to Leh | Drive Through Gata Loops, 21 Hairpin Bends
itinerary.body:
After having your breakfast in the morning, start your journey towards Leh.
En route, enjoy the drive through Gata Loops which is a series of 21 hairpin bends that leads to the top of one of the highest motorable passes in the Ladakh region, Nakee La Pass.
Your next stopover would be Lachung La Pass, yet another high mountain pass in the region.
Take a photo stop on the More Plains where a large stretch of green land is bordered by the mighty Himalayas on all sides.
Have lunch at Pang or the nearby area.
Upon reaching Leh by evening, complete the check-in formalities and rest for some time.
Indulge in a lip-smacking dinner in the hotel.
Overnight stay at the hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Leh Local Sightseeing | Soak in the Enlightening Ladakhi Culture
itinerary.body:
Wake up to a beautiful sunrise and enjoy a hearty breakfast in the hotel and gradually get acclimatized to the climate.
Start your sightseeing in the evening by visiting the beautifully constructed Shanti Stupa, which was built to commemorate the 2500 years of Buddhism.
Visit the Leh Palace which was built in the 17th century that will give you an insight into the bygone golden era of Leh.
Later visit the local Leh Market to buy some Tibetan handicrafts or go cafe hopping to try the delicious Ladakhi cuisine.
Return back to the hotel for a lip-smacking dinner.
Overnight stay at the hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung-La Pass | A Drive to the World’s Highest Motorable Road (18000 ft.)
itinerary.body:
After having a healthy breakfast in the morning, get ready for the ultimate adventure.
This journey will take you through some of the highest passes in the world and will greet you with the ever-changing views of the barren land.
Take a stopover at the cafe on Khardung-La Pass, the world's highest all-season motorable road and soak in the views as you will feel like on top of the world.
As you descend from Khardung-la, experience a change in landscape from the barren cold desert to the white sand desert as you enter the Nubra Valley full of Nubra Sand Dunes.
If time permits, visit the oldest and the largest monastery of Ladakh, the Diskit Monastery, which also houses a large Buddha statue.
Enjoy the exquisite double-humped Bactrian Camel Ride, exclusively found in this region, as this region was a part of the famous silk route.
Later enjoy camping with a bonfire under the sky full of stars.
Overnight stay at the campsite in Nubra Valley.

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Lake | Recreate The Famous Bollywood Moments
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning in the beautiful Nubra Valley and have a scrumptious breakfast.
Get ready for the most awaited day as you will be visiting Pangong Lake on the Indo-China border.
One of the highest altitude saline water lakes, Pangong Tso will greet you with its changing colours from shades of blue to green to red.
Spend the rest of the day exploring the surroundings of the Pangong Lake with the view of the Shyok river on one side and the mountains on another side.
You can also recreate some of the moments from your favourite Bollywood movies like 3-idiots and Jab Tak Hai Jaan and enjoy the place in Bollywood style.
Overnight stay and dinner at a campsite near Pangong Lake.

itinerary.title: Pangong Lake to Leh | Excursion to Rancho School
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning to the beautiful Pangong Lake view and have a delicious breakfast.
As you mark your way back to Leh, take a small stopover at the Chang-la Pass, which is one of the highest mountain passes in the world.
You can also visit the Chang-la Cafe, located just on the Changla Pass.
Visit the Changla Baba Temple on top, after which the pass got its name and is believed to be the guardian of the people visiting Chang La.
Further, visit the Druk Padma School, famed for the movie ‘3 Idiots’ as the site where the last scene was shot.
One can also visit the beautifully structured Thiksey Monastery and Shey Palace en-route, if time permits.
Upon reaching Leh, rest for some time followed by dinner at the hotel.
Overnight stay at a hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Departure | It's Time to say Goodbye to the Mountains
itinerary.body:
After having your breakfast in the morning, complete the check out formalities at the hotel.
Later, you will be transferred to the airport for your onwards journey.
Fly out of Leh and say goodbye to your fellow travellers and this magical land.

itinerary.body:

Board the Volvo in Delhi from the reporting point.
The overnight journey takes you through some of the most scenic views as you travel to the majestic Himalayas to reach Manali the next morning.

Wake up to a beautiful morning in the mountains.
Have a lip-smacking breakfast before you start your journey towards Jispa.
On the way to Jispa, you will travel through the famous Atal Tunnel, one of the longest underground highways in the world.
Move ahead for Sissu and Keylong – the laid-back region where natural beauty remains untouched in its most pristine form.
Here you can explore the beautiful Sissu Lake and Sissu Waterfall.
Explore the lush green Bhaga valley, and then head over to Jispa.
Reach Jispa, which is truly rich in fascinating trails and lush green jungles.
Check in to the camp in Jispa and enjoy evening tea with snacks.
Overnight stay at camps in Jispa.

itinerary.title: Leh to Kargil | Visit the Legendary 'Sham Valley'
itinerary.body:
Wake up to a beautiful morning in the mountains and have a hearty breakfast.
Get ready for an adventurous drive to 'Sham Valley', which is beautifully nestled around the Srinagar - Leh highway.
Start off the sightseeing by paying homage to the martyrs of the Indo-Pak War at the Hall of Fame.
Enjoy delicious langar at Gurudwara Pathar Sahib and know the story behind the construction of this Gurudwara by the army.
Another interesting place to visit today is Magnetic Hill, a small stretch of the road that defies the law of gravity.
Visit Indus Sangam Viewpoint to watch the confluence of Zanskar and Indus Rivers.
Pass through the Lamayuru Village and experience a change in the landscape that appears to have a moon-like surface.
Visit Basgo Palace and monastery that is perched on a steep hill give an impression of huge anthills emerging from the ground.
Reach Kargil in the evening and call it a day.
Dinner and overnight stay at the hotel in Kargil.

itinerary.title: Kargil to Srinagar | Second Coldest Inhabited Place in the World
itinerary.body:
After having breakfast, get ready to start driving towards Srinagar.
Pass through Drass Village; the second coldest inhabited place in the world.
Soak in the amazing views of Kargil, Tiger Hill, and other famous peaks from the Kargil War.
You can take a small stopover at the Kargil War Memorial to pay homage to the martyrs of the Kargil war.
Drive across the mighty Zoji La Pass to reach Srinagar.
Check in to the hotel at Srinagar and rest for some time.
The rest of the day is at leisure, wherein you can choose to explore Srinagar at your own expense.
Dinner and overnight stay at your hotel in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Departure from Srinagar | Time to Leave Heaven of Earth
itinerary.body:
Post breakfast, complete the check out formalities at the hotel.
Get transferred to Srinagar Airport for your onwards journey.
Your amazing Ladakh trip comes to an end with a bag full of memories.

You will also visit the famous Magnetic Hill and SECMOL school, a one of its kind institution functioning without teachers. After a day filled with adventure, you can also opt for a White Water Rafting before getting transferred back to your hotel in Leh for a comfortable overnight stay.

Next, visit the famous Diskit Monastery, & admire the grand statue of Maitreya Buddha.
