title: Classic Ladakh Group Adventure Tour
description: Experience the Classic Ladakh Group Adventure Tour featuring Pangong Lake, Nubra Valley, Himalayan passes, scenic landscapes, and unforgettable Leh Ladakh group

itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh | Leh City Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
Welcome to Leh, the heart of Ladakh! Upon arrival at Leh Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport, you will be transferred to your hotel. After checking in, take some time to relax, & then get ready to go out to explore Leh City. Visit the Leh Palace, a former royal palace offering amazing views of the city. Explore the local market and Shanti Stupa, a Buddhist white-domed stupa offering views of the surrounding mountains. End your day by transferring back to the hotel for an overnight stay.

Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Sumo or similar

itinerary.title: Sham Valley Day Tour | Exploring the Culture of Ladakh
itinerary.body:
In the morning, go on a full-day tour of Sham Valley, also known as the "Apricot Valley." Visit the Hall of Fame, a museum built in memory of the soldiers who lost their lives during the Indo-Pak wars. Continue to Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, a beautiful Sikh temple, and visit SECMOL, the school featured in the iconic Bollywood movie "3 Idiots". Experience the fascinating Magnetic Hill, where cars appear to resist gravity. Later, return to Leh for an overnight stay at your hotel.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass | Exploring the Cold Desert
itinerary.body:
Today get ready for a thrilling journey to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass, one of the highest motorable roads in the world at 17,582 feet. On arrival in Nubra Valley, often referred to as the "Valley of Flowers." Visit the Diskit Monastery, which houses a 106-foot-tall Maitreya Buddha statue. Explore the unique sand dunes of Hunder, where you can enjoy a camel ride on the double-humped Bactrian camels or ATV ride. Upon arriving in Nubra, you'll check-in at your camp for an overnight stay.

Breakfast ] Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Nubra Valley · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso | Camping Under the Stars
itinerary.body:
After breakfast, depart for Pangong Tso, a stunning high-altitude lake situated at 14,270 feet. The journey takes you through Shyok Valley, offering mesmerising views of rugged mountains and serene landscapes. Upon arrival at Pangong Tso, be amazed by the lake's ever-changing hues of blue. Spend your afternoon exploring the lake’s shores, taking photographs, and enjoying the tranquillity of this remote location. In the evening, enjoy a campfire dinner and camp under the stars by the lake.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Pangong Tso · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Pangong Tso to Leh via Chang La Pass | Visiting the Real Rancho School
itinerary.body:
Check-out from the hotel and begin your journey back to Leh via the scenic Chang La Pass, the third-highest motorable road in the world. Take a break at the Chang La Baba Temple, a sacred sanctuary honouring the valiant soldiers. En route, visit the Thiksey Monastery with Druk Padma Karpo School, famously known as the "Rancho School". Explore the school & learn about its unique educational initiatives. Continue your journey & arrive in Leh by evening. Check-in to the hotel for an overnight stay.

Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

title: Leh Ladakh Group Adventure with Turtuk Village
description: Experience the ultimate Leh Ladakh Group Adventure with Turtuk Village featuring Pangong Lake, Nubra Valley, scenic Himalayan roads, and unforgettable Ladakh gr

itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh | Welcome to the Top of the World
itinerary.body:
After landing in Leh, get welcomed by a representative, who will help in smooth transfer to the hotel.
Upon reaching your hotel, complete the check-in formalities and spend a relaxing day getting proper rest.
Enjoy a hearty breakfast in the hotel and gradually get acclimatized to the climate.
Ladakh is a region that is located at a high elevation and taking the altitude sickness in serious consideration, the whole day will be at leisure.
In the evening, enjoy a lip-smacking dinner.
Overnight stay at the hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Leh to Sham Valley | Exploring Borders of Leh
itinerary.body:
Wake up to a beautiful morning in the mountains and have a hearty breakfast.
Get ready for an adventurous drive to 'Sham Valley', which is beautifully nestled around the Srinagar - Leh highway.
Start off the sightseeing by paying homage to the martyrs of the Indo-Pak War at the Hall of Fame.
Visit the Spituk Gompa which also has a museum on the premises housing ancient masks, weapons and Thangkas (Buddhist Paintings).
Enjoy delicious langar at Gurudwara Pathar Sahib and know the story behind the construction of this Gurudwara by the army.
Another interesting place to visit today is Magnetic Hill, a small stretch of the road that defies the law of gravity.
Visit Indus Sangam Viewpoint to watch the confluence of Zanskar and Indus Rivers.
Visit SECMOL which is the real 3-idiots school.
After a day filled with fun and adventure, return back to the hotel for dinner and an overnight stay in Leh.

itinerary.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung-La Pass | A Drive to the World’s Highest Motorable Road (18000 ft.)
itinerary.body:
After having a healthy breakfast in the morning, get ready for the ultimate adventure.
This journey will take you through some of the highest passes in the world and will greet you with the ever-changing views of the barren land.
Take a stopover at the cafe on Khardung-La Pass, the world's highest all-season motorable road and soak in the views as you will feel like on top of the world.
As you descend from Khardung-la, experience a change in landscape from the barren cold desert to the white sand desert as you enter the Nubra Valley full of Nubra Sand Dunes.
If time permits, visit the oldest and the largest monastery of Ladakh, the Diskit Monastery, which also houses a large Buddha statue.
Enjoy the exquisite double-humped Bactrian Camel Ride, exclusively found in this region, as this region was a part of the famous silk route.
Later enjoy camping with a bonfire under the sky full of stars.
Overnight stay at the campsite in Nubra Valley.

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley to Turtuk Village | Last Village of India
itinerary.body:
After a delicious breakfast, drive towards Turtuk.
Turtuk is the last outpost in India after which the Pakistan-controlled Gilgit-Baltistan begins and is one of the gateways to the Siachen Glacier.
The place is culturally, linguistically, and historically different from what you’ve seen till now in your Ladakh holiday as it falls under the Gilgit-Baltistan region. Even the landscape is different with dramatic narrow valleys and steep mountains, unlike Central Ladakh and Nubra.
Comparatively, situated at a lower altitude than Leh, you’ll see green pastures here that yield fresh produce like apricots and apples.
Come back to the csamps and indulge in a lip-smacking dinner.
Overnight stay in camps at Nubra valley

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Lake | Recreate the Famous Bollywood Moments
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning in the beautiful Nubra Valley and have a scrumptious breakfast.
Get ready for the most awaited day as you will be visiting Pangong Lake on the Indo-China border.
One of the highest altitude saline water lakes, Pangong Tso will greet you with its changing colours from shades of blue to green to red.
Spend the rest of the day exploring the surroundings of the Pangong Lake with the view of the Shyok river on one side and the mountains on another side.
You can also recreate some of the moments from your favourite Bollywood movies like 3-idiots and Jab Tak Hai Jaan and enjoy the place in Bollywood style.
Overnight stay and dinner at a campsite near Pangong Lake.

itinerary.title: Pangong Lake to Leh | Excursion to Rancho School
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning to the beautiful Pangong Lake view and have a delicious breakfast.
As you mark your way back to Leh, take a small stopover at the Chang-la Pass, which is one of the highest mountain passes in the world.
You can also visit the Chang-la Cafe, located just on the Changla Pass.
Visit the Changla Baba Temple on top, after which the pass got its name and is believed to be the guardian of the people visiting Chang La.
Further, visit the Druk Padma School, famed for the movie ‘3 Idiots’ as the site where the last scene was shot.
One can also visit the beautifully structured Thiksey Monastery en-route, if time permits.
Upon reaching Leh, rest for some time followed by dinner at the hotel.
Overnight stay at a hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Departure | It's Time to say Goodbye to the Mountains
itinerary.body:
After having your breakfast in the morning, complete the check out formalities at the hotel.
Later, you will be transferred to the airport for your onwards journey.
Fly out of Leh and say goodbye to your fellow travellers and this magical land.

title: Srinagar Leh Manali Himalayan Road Expedition
description: Srinagar Leh Manali Himalayan Road Expedition with Pangong Lake, Nubra Valley, high mountain passes & thrilling Himalayan bike adventures.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar
itinerary.body:
Welcome to Srinagar, the crown jewel of Kashmir! After you arrive at the Srinagar Airport, you will get transferred to your pre-booked hotel. Check-in at your hotel and relax for a while. You will spend the rest of day at leisure, exploring the beautiful city. You can visit the Dastgeer Sahib, Zero bridge, Dal Lake and more. Later, you will return to the hotel for a comfortable overnight stay. Note: Vehicle will be provided as per the group size

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Kargil | Enroute Sightseeing from Srinagar to Kargil
itinerary.body:
After check-out, you'll embark on a scenic journey to Kargil, through the majestic Zoji La Pass, where mighty Himalayan peaks and winding roads create a breathtaking backdrop. En route, you'll pause at Tiger Hill to enjoy panoramic views of the rugged terrain. Next, stop at the Kargil War Memorial, honoring the sacrifices of brave soldiers. Upon arrival in Kargil, you'll check-in at your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Kargil · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Kargil to Leh | Exploring the Wonders of Ladakh
itinerary.body:
Post check-out, embark on a scenic journey to Leh, through the towering Ladakhi terrain. Drive across the Namikala pass and make a stop at the Lamayuru Monastery and the Alchi Monastery. Marvel at the Sangam of the Indus and Zanskar rivers & experience the Magnetic Hill phenomenon. Next, pay respect at Gurudwara Pathar Sahib and enjoy a delicious langar at the gurdwara. Later, check-in at your pre-booked hotel in Leh for a comfortable overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Leh Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
After breakfast at your hotel, embark on a Leh sightseeing tour through the rich Ladakhi history. Experience the royal charm of Leh Palace's architecture, drive up to the scenic Shanti Stupa, and wander through the bustling Leh Market. As the day ends, you'll be driven back to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast l Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass | Exploring the Cold Desert
itinerary.body:
Post check out, begin your journey towards the beautiful Nubra Valley through the famous Khardung La Pass. As you ascend one of the highest all season motorable pass, pause & enjoy steaming maggi at the Rinchen cafe. Next, visit the famous Diskit Monastery, & admire the grand statue of Maitreya Buddha. Once you reach, embark on an ATV adventure ride in the Hunder Sand Dunes, before arriving at the campsite in Nubra for check-in and overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Nubra Valley · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso | Camping at the Pangong Tso
itinerary.body:
Check-out of the camp and begin your journey towards Pangong Lake, with beautiful views of the famous Ladakhi peaks. As you continue your journey towards Pangong, you will make a stop at one of the charming Ladakhi village along the banks of Shyok river. Once you arrive at Pangong Lake, settle into your camp & head out for a stroll along the lake. Enjoy the atmosphere as the water of this saltwater lake changes from blue to turquoise, reflecting the majestic Himalayas.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Pangong Tso · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Pangong Tso to Leh | Driving Through the Majestic Chang La Pass
itinerary.body:
After checking out from your camp at Pangong Tso, head back to Leh, via Chang La Pass. En route, you will make a stop at the Chang La Baba temple. Next, make a stop at the Druk Padma Karpo School, famous as the filming location of from the acclaimed movie '3 Idiots'. Afterwards, you will make a stop at Thiksey Monastery & explore its collection of Buddhist artifacts, books and more. Upon reaching Leh, check-in and settle into your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Leh to Sarchu | Exploring the Rugged Beauty of Sarchu
itinerary.body:
Check-out from your hotel in Leh and get ready for an exciting journey through the terrains of Ladakh towards Himachal. Drive across the winding passes of Ladakh, like the Tanglang La, Lachung La, Nakeela and enjoy the views of vast grasslands across the Moore Plains. Embrace the adrenaline rush as you drive across the 21 hairpin bends of Gata Loops. After arrival in Sarchu, check-in at your campsite for a relaxing overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Sarchu · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Sarchu to Manali via Jispa
itinerary.body:
After checking out from your camp in Sarchu, embark on a scenic journey to Manali via Jispa with views of a diverse terrain. Along the way, enjoy the rugged beauty of Baralacha La Pass, the serene Suraj Tal, vibrant Zingzing Bar, Deepak Tal, charming Sissu Lake and Sissu Waterfall. After arriving in Manali, settle into your cozy pre-booked hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Manali · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Day at Leisure | Departure from Manali
itinerary.body:
Post check out from your hotel in Manali, you'll get transferred to the Manali bus stop. Enjoy some leisure time to explore Manali at your own pace and expense before your bus departs. You can spend your time at the Mall Road, shopping for souvenirs and exploring the numerous eateries. In the evening, make your way to the Manali Bus stop to catch the overnight Volvo AC semi-sleeper bus to Delhi.

Breakfast · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Arrival in Delhi | End of Trip
itinerary.body: After arriving in Delhi in the morning, you'll board the final transfer of your journey towards home. As you depart from Delhi, reflecting on the memories and experiences gathered during your trip, you bring to a close this remarkable adventure.

title: Manali Leh Srinagar Adventure with Rancho School Visit
description: Manali Leh Srinagar Adventure with Rancho School Visit featuring Pangong Lake, Himalayan roads, scenic valleys & thrilling Leh Ladakh bike rides.

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi | Gateway to Land of High Passes
itinerary.body:
Today, we start our dream trip! You’ll be meeting our representative in Delhi at the bus pickup point.
We travel overnight in an AC Volvo from Delhi to Manali.
Tomorrow, you’ll wake up to the fresh lush greens and mesmerizing mountains in the Land of Gods - Himachal Pradesh

Dinner · Stay: Uno Grand · Transport: SUV

itinerary.title: Manali | Land of Scenic Beauty
itinerary.body:
After arriving at Manali, get welcomed by our representative in a traditional way
Later get transferred to the hotel in a sanitized vehicle with a welcome drink at the time of check-in
Enjoy a hearty breakfast in the hotel
Take a rest and enjoy the beauty of Manali by visiting Mall Road, Hadimba temple, and old Manali
You can also visit Solang Valley and try out different adventurous sports activities like paragliding, Snow Scooter, Cable Car Ropeway, Skiing and many more fun activities.
In the evening, our tour leader will brief you about the various safety measures, riding tips, and gear checkups. 
Collect your motorcycles and check it with a short ride around the town
The group would have an opportunity to get acquainted with the fellow riders at dinner time.
Have dinner at the hotel and enjoy an overnight stay in Hotel

itinerary.title: Manali to Jispa | Get Acclimatized in Lush Green Jungles
itinerary.body:
After breakfast, start your journey towards Jispa crossing Rohtang pass
the picturesque vistas of Rohtang attract photography lovers from all over the country every year. The clear blue skies, pristine snow, and the Magnificent Himalayas which is so spectacular that it has been featured in many Bollywood blockbusters ranging from Jab We Met to Yeh Jawani Hai Diwani
Move ahead for Keylong – the laid-back region where natural beauty remains untouched in its most pristine form
Explore the lush green Bhaga valley, and then head over to Jispa
Located right next to the Chandra River, Jispa is truly rich in fascinating trails and lush green jungles
Check in to the camp in Jispa and enjoy evening tea with snacks
Overnight stay in camp

itinerary.title: Jispa to Sarchu | Enjoy the Confluence of 3 Valleys
itinerary.body:
After breakfast depart towards Sarchu
Explore this picturesque Himalayan village, before moving on to Zingzing Bar – one the highest roadside bars in the world
Your next stop is Baralacha La. Standing at 16000 feet, you can enjoy the confluence of the 3 valleys
Enjoy your lunch at Bharatpur tent colony
Reach Sarchu in the afternoon & enjoy a bunch of exciting activities organized by the operator.
Enjoy your dinner and overnight stay in a camp in Sarchu

itinerary.title: Sarchu to Leh | Welcome to Top of the World
itinerary.body:
After breakfast, start your journey towards Leh
Enjoy the ride through Gata Loops which is a series of 21 hairpin bends that leads to the top of one of the highest motorable passes in Ladakh region that is Nakee La
Stop at places like Nakeela River, Lachung La
Have lunch at Pang or the nearby area
Reach Leh by evening, take a rest and get ready to roam around the Leh city area
Indulge in a lip-smacking dinner in the hotel
Overnight stay at the hotel in Leh

itinerary.title: Leh Local Sightseeing | Soak in the Enlightening Ladakhi Culture
itinerary.body:
Have a mouth-watering breakfast at the hotel and then start your sightseeing tour of Leh.
Start with a visit to the popular Shanti Stupa which promises an amazing sunset view and a panoramic view of the city from the clifftop.
Post which, you will explore the ancient symbols of the royal family in the Leh Palace area.
Experience the world-famous Hall of fame and learn more about the Indo-Pak wars and the martyrs
Later, head out to explore the shops in the Leh bazaar and do some shopping.
Overnight stay at a hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung-La Pass | A drive to the World’s Highest Motorable Road (18000 ft.)
itinerary.body:
After breakfast in the hotel, prepare yourself for the ultimate adventure
The journey from Leh to Nubra falls on a very scenic route
Known as the gateway to the Shyok and Nubra valleys, the Khardung-La pass is the world's highest all-season motorable road.
Also, enjoy the most loved snack - Maggi at the Khardungla Cafe.
As you descend from Khardung-la, experience the white sand dunes in Nubra and enjoy a ride of the double-humped camel, exclusively found in Ladakh.
Later enjoy camping the bonfire under the sky full of stars. 
Overnight stay at the campsite in Nubra Valley.

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Lake | Relive Bollywood moments
itinerary.body:
In the morning after breakfast, drive to Pangong Lake on the Indo-China border.
Enjoy the scenic beauty of the Shyok river on one side and the Mountains on another side.
The lake is a major attraction of the region and is amongst the highest altitude saline water lakes in the world and changes colors from shades of blue to green to red.
Featured in movies like 3-idiots and Jab Tak Hai Jaan, it is said to be the most beautiful lake in India. 
Later, get back to your accommodation at a campsite near Pangong lake under the open sky.

itinerary.title: Pangong Lake to Leh | Excursion to Rancho School
itinerary.body:
Wake up in the morning to the beautiful Pangong Lake view
The journey from Pangong Lake back to Leh takes you via Chang La, a mountain pass situated at an altitude of 17,590 feet (5360 meters).
Along the way, pay a visit to the Druk White Lotus School, which shot to fame with the movie ‘3 Idiots’ as the site where the last scene was shot
Known to be the largest Tibetan monastery in Ladakh, visit Thiksey monastery housing several stupas, statues, and other Buddhist artifacts in its 12 story structure.
Reach Leh and enjoy a delicious dinner at the hotel
Overnight stay at a hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Leh to Kargil | Visit the Legendary 'Sham Valley
itinerary.body:
Begin your day early with a delicious breakfast and prepare for an adventurous drive,
Visit the confluence of the Zanskar- Indus Rivers, which is also the world's highest river rafting point
Explore the Magnetic Hill, where you can witness the unusual phenomenon of vehicles sliding uphill on neutral gear
While returning to Leh, enjoy delicious langar at Gurudwara Pathar Sahib
Later visit SECMOL which is the actual 3-idiots school, where in order to get the admission you need to be 10th fail! 
Also, visit the Basgo Palace which comprises a dark red base and sky-high temples on the steep trails.
Starting on the Ladakh- Srinagar highway, drive to Kargil, and visit the Giant Buddha at the green and beautiful Mulbek Village en route.
Relish tempting dinner as you stargaze around the bonfire.
Overnight stay at the hotel in Kargil

itinerary.title: Kargil to Srinagar | Second Coldest Inhabited Place in the World
itinerary.body:
After having breakfast, get ready to start riding towards Srinagar.
En route, we will be passing Drass Village; the second coldest inhabited place in the world.
Soak in amazing views of Kargil, Tiger Hill and other famous peaks from the Kargil War.
Drive across the mighty Zoji La Pass and arrive in Srinagar by the evening.
Check in the hotel at Srinagar and the evening is free for your leisure.
Come back to have a delicious dinner at the hotel.
Overnight stay at your hotel in Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Departure from Srinagar | Time to Leave Heaven of Earth
itinerary.body:
Post breakfast, depart from Srinagar for your onward journey.
The cab will drop you at the airport.
End your Leh Ladakh tour package with a bag full of memories

title: Leh Ladakh Bike Trip with Chang-La Pass Excursion
description: Ride across the majestic Himalayas on a Leh Ladakh Bike Tour with Chang La Pass adventure, exploring scenic routes, cold deserts, mountain passes, and beautiful

itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh | Leh Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
Welcome to Leh! Upon arrival at the airport, get driven to the hotel and get greeted with a Katak Shawl. Post check-in, take your bike to explore Leh & visit the 15th-century Tsemo Castle, offering stunning views of Leh. Next, visit the Shanti Stupa, a symbol of peace, & admire the Tibetan architecture of the Leh Palace. Continue to the Leh Market & stroll through its vibrant shops where you can get a T-shirt printed as a keepsake. Also, you can savor food at the iconic German Bakery.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Sumo or similar

itinerary.title: Ride to Sham Valley | Exploring the Mysteries & Wonders of Ladakh
itinerary.body:
Today, gear up for an unforgettable bike ride to Sham Valley. Make your first stop at the Sangam, the meeting point of the Indus & Zanskar rivers. Next, test the laws of gravity at Magnetic Hill & get a chance to snap a selfie at its famous selfie point. Also, you can take a snacks break at Zins cafe before paying your respects at the Gurudwara Pathar Sahib. Later, explore to SECMOL—feautured in the movie 3 Idiots. You can also opt for a white water rafting before returning to your hotel.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Ride from Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass | Exploring the Cold Desert
itinerary.body:
Check out & ride to Nubra Valley via the iconic Khardung La Pass—one of the world’s highest motorable roads. Make a stop & savor maggi at the famous Khardungla cafe before enjoying views from the Milkha Point, featured in "Bhaag Milkha Bhaag". Next, visit the valley's oldest Diskit Monastery & continue to the Hunder Sand Dunes, where you can go on a double-humped Bactrian camel ride. Later, you can indulge in adventure at the Desert Himalaya Adventure Park before checking into your campsite.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Nubra Valley · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Ride from Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso | Camping Under the Stars
itinerary.body:
Wake up to a golden sunrise in Nubra & check out from your camp for an epic ride to the iconic Pangong Lake. Ride along the winding route beside the Shyok River, flanked by rugged mountains & raw Himalayan beauty. En route, you can stop at the BRO Café for a warm cuppa with a view. Upon reaching Pangong, marvel at the lake's stunning beauty as it shifts shades from blue to green to golden. Also, spend peaceful moments by the lake and breathe in the crisp air before checking into your campsite.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Pangong Tso · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Ride from Pangong Tso to Leh via Chang La Pass
itinerary.body:
After check-out, embark on a thrilling ride to Leh via the stunning Chang La Pass. En route, stop at the Chang La Baba Temple, one of the highest temples in the world, accessible by road. Also, you can go for an amazing paragliding adventure surrounded by Leh's stunning landscapes at the Sakti Village. Later, visit the iconic Druk Padma Karpo School of 3 Idiots fame and admire the stunning architecture of the Thiksey Monastery. Later, upon reaching Leh, check into your hotel and relax.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.body:
Take one last glance at the beauty of Ladakh as you get transferred to the Leh Airport, after check-out from your hotel. Bid farewell to Ladakh and board your flight to home, marking the end of your trip.

Breakfast · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Sumo or similar

title: Manali Leh Srinagar Grand Bike Expedition
description: Experience the Manali Leh Srinagar Grand Bike Expedition with thrilling mountain roads, scenic valleys & iconic passes. Perfect Himalayan bike adventure

itinerary.title: Arrival in Delhi | Transfer to Manali
itinerary.body:
Welcome to the capital city of India, your starting point for this bike adventure across the Land of High Passes - Ladakh! For your transfer to Manali, you will board a Volvo bus from Majnu ka Tila. Enjoy the change of scenery, from cityscapes to lush green landscapes and towering Himalayan peaks, as you continue your overnight journey towards Manali.

Dinner · Stay: Uno Grand · Transport: Transfer in AC Volvo

itinerary.title: Arrival in Manali
itinerary.body:
Once you reach Manali, settle into your hotel and spend the day at leisure, exploring Manali at your own pace. Visit the vibrant Mall Road, Manu Temple, and more of Manali's wonderful attractions. Later, get your bike and enjoy an overnight stay. Note: Vehicle will be provided as per the group size.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Manali · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

itinerary.title: Ride from Manali to Jispa via Atal Tunnel
itinerary.body:
After checking out, kickstart your biking adventure in the lap of Himalayas by cruising through the renowned Atal Tunnel towards Jispa. Along the route, pause at Sissu to marvel at the stunning Sissu Lake and its cascading waterfall, embraced by majestic mountains. Carry on your journey to Jispa, soaking in the picturesque views. Upon arrival, settle into your camp for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Check-in at Standard hotel · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Ride from Jispa to Sarchu via Baralacha La Pass
itinerary.body:
After checking out, set off on your bike towards Sarchu, enjoying the stunning landscapes of the Himalayas. Experience the beauty of Deepak Tal, Suraj Tal and visit the famous ZingZing Bar. Ride across the scenic Baralacha La Pass before reaching your campsite. Upon check-in, unwind and enjoy the beauty of your surroundings during your overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Sarchu · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Ride from Sarchu to Leh via Gata Loops
itinerary.body:
After checking out, kickstart your thrilling bike journey towards Leh. Enjoy the exciting ride through the adventurous Gata Loops, then ride across the scenic passes such as Nakee La, Lachung La, and beyond. Upon reaching your hotel in Leh, check-in and unwind for an overnight stay after a day filled with adventure.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Leh Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
Start your day with a Leh Sightseeing Tour on your bike. Learn about history at Leh Palace, discovering its rich heritage as you explore its corridors. Next, visit the famous Shanti Stupa, and later the vibrant Leh market, where you can shop for authentic local treasures. Then, ride back to your hotel for a cozy overnight stay, filled with memories of the day's adventures.

Breakfast Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Ride from Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass | Exploring the Cold Desert
itinerary.body:
After check-out, hop onto your bike for the journey to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass. While riding through the Khardung La Pass, take a break to relish hot maggi at the Rinchen cafe. Then, explore the renowned Diskit Monastery and marvel at the majestic statue of Maitreya Buddha. Experience an exhilarating ATV adventure in the Hunder Sand Dunes before reaching the campsite in Nubra for check-in and an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Check-in at Standard hotel · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Ride from Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso | Camping at the Pangong Tso
itinerary.body:
Check-out of the campsite and kickstart your bike adventure towards Pangong Lake. Marvel at the breathtaking views of the Himalayan peaks as you journey onwards. Upon reaching Pangong Lake, check-in at the camp and head out for a leisurely stroll along the lake. Enjoy the ever changing hues of this saltwater lake with the majestic Himalayas in the backdrop.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Check-in at Standard hotel · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Ride from Pangong Tso to Leh | Driving Through the Majestic Chang La Pass
itinerary.body:
After you've checked out from your camp at Pangong Tso, ride back to Leh, cruising across the breathtaking Chang La Pass. Along the way, pause for a moment at the Chang La Baba temple. Visit the Druk Padma Karpo School, famous for featuring in several scenes of the acclaimed movie '3 Idiots'. Then, take a break to experience the rich Buddhist heritage of Ladakh at Thiksey Monastery. Once you arrive in Leh, settle into your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Ride from Leh to Kargil | Enroute Sightseeing
itinerary.body:
In the morning, check-out of the hotel in Leh, and start your ride towards Kargil, winding through the scenic paths of Ladakh. Along the way, you'll stop at the renowned Alchi and Lamayuru Monasteries, each a prime spot for history and spirituality. Upon reaching Kargil, check-in at your pre-booked hotel and enjoy your comfortable overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Kargil · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Ride from Kargil to Srinagar
itinerary.body:
In the morning, check-out from your hotel in Kargil and ride your bike towards Srinagar. Along the way, enjoy breathtaking views of towering mountains, lush valleys, clear lakes. Also, enjoy a stop-over at the beautiful Kargil War Memorial and learn about its significance before continuing your journey to Srinagar. Upon arrival in Srinagar, you will check-in at your pre-booked hotel and spend the rest of the day at leisure. Afterwards, return to your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Srinagar · Transport: Transfer in Own Bike

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.body:
On departure day, after checking out from your hotel, you'll board your transfer for Srinagar Airport, through the scenic valleys of Kashmir. Enjoy one last look of the picturesque surroundings of Kashmir, before boarding your flight back home. This marks the end of your trip.

Transport: Transfer in Innova, Tempo Traveller or similar

title: Private Leh Ladakh Highlights Tour
description: Explore the Private Leh Ladakh Highlights Tour with Pangong Lake, monasteries & scenic valleys. Perfect luxury private Leh Ladakh vacation package.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh | Leh Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
Welcome to Ladakh! Upon your arrival in Leh, get transferred to your hotel & check in. Later, get driven for a sightseeing tour starting with Tsemo Castle, perched on a hilltop and known for panoramic views of the Leh valley. Continue to the Shanti Stupa and the historic Leh Palace, a 17th-century structure with Tibetan-style architecture and old royal artifacts. Conclude your day by strolling through the lively Leh Market, where you can get a custom-printed T-shirt. Then, return to your hotel.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Sumo or similar

itinerary.title: Sham Valley Day Tour | Exploring the Mysteries of Ladakh
itinerary.body:
Today, you'll be driven for an excursion to Sham Valley, starting with a visit to Sangam, where the Indus and Zanskar rivers meet. Stop at Magnetic Hill, known for its optical illusion that appears to defy gravity. Take a short break at Zins Café before visiting Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, a sikh shrine maintained by the Indian Army. Continue to SECMOL, the alternative school featured in 3 Idiots, and if interested, you can also try white water rafting in the Zanskar River.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass | Exploring Nubra Valley
itinerary.body:
Today, check out and get driven to Nubra Valley, travelling through Khardung La Pass—among the highest motorable routes in the world. Take a short break at Khardungla Café for a warm bowl of Maggi, followed by a stop at Milkha Point, a scenic viewpoint popularised by the movie Bhaag Milkha Bhaag. Visit the historic Diskit Monastery to explore its age-old murals and hilltop statue. Continue to the Hunder Sand Dunes, where you can ride a double-humped Bactrian camel & then, check in to your stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Nubra Valley · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Journey from Nubra to Pangong | Camping Under the Stars
itinerary.body:
Start your day by witnessing a beautiful sunrise over Nubra Valley. After check-out, begin your drive to Pangong Lake via the Shyok River route, known for its remote valleys, winding roads, and stark mountain scenery. On reaching Pangong, check in to your stay and spend time admiring the lake’s clear waters as they shift in color with the sunlight—from deep blue to greenish hues. You may also stop by the BRO Café nearby for a quick refreshment.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Pangong Tso · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer from Pangong Tso to Leh via Chang La Pass | En Route Sightseeing at Chang La Pass
itinerary.body:
After checking out, you'll be driven back to Leh via the high-altitude Chang La Pass. Stop briefly at the Chang La Baba Temple, dedicated to the guardian of the pass. Continue to Thiksey Monastery, a 12-story complex known for its large Maitreya Buddha statue and hilltop views. Visit Druk Padma Karpo School, recognized from the film "3 Idiots." Continue to Leh and upon arrival, check in to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Stok Village Day Tour | Exploring the History & Heritage
itinerary.body:
Today, you'll be driven to the Sindhu Ghat, a peaceful riverside spot perfect for photography along the banks of the Indus River. Then, head to Stok Village and explore Stok Palace, once the summer residence of the Ladakhi royal family and now a museum showcasing royal artifacts. Enjoy a traditional Ladakhi meal at Willow Kitchen & Bar. Later, you can visit Hemis Monastery before being driven back to the hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.body:
Bid adieu to Leh as you check out from the hotel. Then, get transferred to the Leh airport for your flight back home, savoring one last look at the mighty Himalayas. This marks the end of your Ladakh expedition.

Breakfast · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Sumo or similar

itinerary.title: Day 8

title: Ultimate Leh Ladakh Bike Adventure Expedition
description: Experience the Ultimate Leh Ladakh Bike Adventure Expedition with Pangong Lake, mountain passes & scenic roads. Perfect Himalayan bike expedition trip

itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh | Leh Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
Welcome to Leh! Upon arrival at the airport, get driven to the hotel and get greeted with a Katak Shawl. Post check-in, take your bike to explore Leh & visit the 15th-century Tsemo Castle, offering stunning views of Leh. Next, visit the Shanti Stupa, a symbol of peace, & admire the Tibetan architecture of the Leh Palace. Continue to the Leh Market & stroll through its vibrant shops where you can get a T-shirt printed as a keepsake. Also, you can savor food at the iconic German Bakery.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Sumo or similar

itinerary.title: Ride to Sham Valley | Exploring the Mysteries & Wonders of Ladakh
itinerary.body:
Today, gear up for an unforgettable bike ride to Sham Valley. Make your first stop at the Sangam, the meeting point of the Indus & Zanskar rivers. Next, test the laws of gravity at Magnetic Hill & get a chance to snap a selfie at its famous selfie point. Also, you can take a snacks break at Zins cafe before paying your respects at the Gurudwara Pathar Sahib. Later, explore to SECMOL—feautured in the movie 3 Idiots. You can also opt for a white water rafting before returning to your hotel.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Ride from Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass | Exploring the Cold Desert
itinerary.body:
Check out & ride to Nubra Valley via the iconic Khardung La Pass—one of the world’s highest motorable roads. Make a stop & savor maggi at the famous Khardungla cafe before enjoying views from the Milkha Point, featured in "Bhaag Milkha Bhaag". Next, visit the valley's oldest Diskit Monastery & continue to the Hunder Sand Dunes, where you can go on a double-humped Bactrian camel ride. Later, you can indulge in adventure at the Desert Himalaya Adventure Park before checking into your campsite.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Nubra Valley · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Ride from Nubra Valley to Pangong Tso | Camping Under the Stars
itinerary.body:
Wake up to a golden sunrise in Nubra & check out from your camp for an epic ride to the iconic Pangong Lake. Ride along the winding route beside the Shyok River, flanked by rugged mountains & raw Himalayan beauty. En route, stop at the stunning BRO Café for a warm cuppa with a view. Upon reaching Pangong, marvel at the lake's stunning beauty as it shifts shades from blue to green to golden. Also, spend peaceful moments by the lake and breathe in the crisp air before checking into your campsite.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Camp in Pangong Tso · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Ride from Pangong Tso to Leh via Chang La Pass
itinerary.body:
After check-out, embark on a thrilling ride to Leh via the stunning Chang La Pass. En route, stop at the Chang La Baba Temple, one of the highest temples in the world, accessible by road. Also, you can go for an amazing paragliding adventure surrounded by Leh's stunning landscapes at the Sakti Village. Later, visit the iconic Druk Padma Karpo School of 3 Idiots fame and admire the stunning architecture of the Thiksey Monastery. Later, upon reaching Leh, check into your hotel and relax.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Bike Adventure to Stok Village | Exploring the History & Heritage
itinerary.body:
Today, embark on a scenic bike ride to the beautiful Stok Village, riding past Ladakh’s rugged terrain. Once there, explore the village & marvel at its traditional Ladakhi architecture. Continue your ride to Sindhu Ghat, where you can click amazing pictures before exploring the Stok Palace, the former summer palace of the Ladakh royal family. Also, savor authentic Ladakhi food at the Willow Kitchen & Bar. Later, get a chance to visit the historic Hemis Monastery before riding back to your hotel.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Standard Hotel in Lehb · Transport: Transfer in Royal Enfield Himalayan

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.body:
Take one last glance at the beauty of Ladakh as you get transferred to the Leh Airport, after check-out from your hotel. Bid farewell to Ladakh and board your flight to home, marking the end of your trip

Breakfast · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Sumo or similar

title: Ladakh Explorer with Turtuk Village Adventure
description: Explore Ladakh Explorer with Turtuk Village Adventure featuring Nubra Valley, mountain roads & scenic landscapes. Perfect Ladakh adventure tour getaway.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh | Behold the Beauty of Leh
itinerary.body:
Juley! Welcome to the Land of High Passes. Upon reaching, get transferred to the hotel and freshen up. Then, get assisted for a sightseeing tour of Leh. First, visit the Leh Palace and dive deep into the royal heritage of the destination, followed by a visit to the Shanti Stupa where you can enjoy breathtaking views of the Leh cityscape and the surrounding mountains. At your last stop, immerse yourself in the vibrant ambience of Leh Marketplace before heading back to your hotel for the night.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Deluxe Hotel in Leh · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Omni or similar

itinerary.title: Leh to Sham Valley | Sham Valley Excursion
itinerary.body:
Get ready to take a tour of the beautiful Sham Valley. Enjoy a scenic drive and visit the Sangam Point (meeting point of the Zanskar and Indus Rivers) and the Magnetic Hill. On this journey, you will also visit attractions such as Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, SECMOL Campus featured in the "3 Idiots" Bollywood film, and the Hall of Fame War Memorial. Wind up your day and return to the hotel in Leh for an overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Leh to Nubra via Khardung La Pass | Exploring the Cold Deserts of Nubra
itinerary.body:
Check-out from Leh and begin your journey to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass (world’s highest all-season motorable pass). Ride past the ancient Diskit Monastery and witness the enormous Maitreya Buddha Statue. Then, reach the Hunder Sand Dunes where you can enjoy a double-humped camel ride or an ATV ride, exploring the cold deserts of Nubra Valley. Later, get assisted to the campsite by the Shyok River and watch the stars dazzle at night as you enjoy your overnight stay here.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to Turtuk Village | The Home of the Baltis
itinerary.body:
For this day, get transferred to the Turtuk village from the Nubra Valley campsite. Admire beauty of this region which lies in the steep mountain slopes that surround the lush green village. Explore Turtuk on foot and experience the unique culture and traditions of the Balti people. Witness the vast Apricot and Apple Orchards, take a tour of the Turtuk Monastery, and then finally visit the enormous Turtuk Polo Ground. Later, get assisted back to your camp in Nubra Valley for an overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Trip from Nubra to Pangong | Camping at Pangong
itinerary.body:
Wake up to another day of adventure on your Ladakh tour. Check-out from the Nubra Valley camp and start your trip by visiting Pangong Lake. Drive by the Shyok River while soaking-in the majestic beauty of the landscape. Reach and check-in to your stay, then witness the Pangong Lake and spend time by its quiet waters. Return to your camp for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Journey from Pangong to Leh | Rounding off the journey
itinerary.body:
As you travel from Pangong to Leh after checking-out from your stay, you will cross on of the highest motorable passes in the world, Chang La. Then, visit the Druk Padma Karpo School (Rancho School), featured in the Bollywood blockbuster film ‘3 Idiots’. Continue to the Thiksey Monastery, the largest monastery in Central Ladakh where you can take-in the tranquil ambience of the place and enjoy the true essence of Ladakh. Later, get assisted to the hotel in Leh and check-in for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Innova, Xylo or similar

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.body:
Today marks the departure day. Check-out from the hotel, and get transferred to the airport for your flight back home.

Breakfast · Transport: Transfer in Eeco, Omni or similar

title: Shimla Hill Station Getaway from Delhi
description: Enjoy a Shimla Hill Station Getaway from Delhi with scenic mountain views, peaceful weather & relaxing stays. Perfect Himachal weekend escape for travelers.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Delhi I Transfer to Shimla
itinerary.body:
Upon arrival in Delhi, get transferred to Shimla. After reaching Shimla, check into your hotel. You can enjoy shopping by visiting the local markets. Later, head back to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Stay: Stay at Deluxe hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Sightseeing Tour of Shimla
itinerary.body:
Get transferred for a sightseeing tour of Shimla. Enjoy the scenic view from the top of the Jakhoo Hill. Visit the Ridge Road, Christ Church and enjoy shopping at the Mall Road. Later, get transferred to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Stay: Stay at Deluxe hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to Naldehra and Kufri
itinerary.body:
Get transferred to enjoy the beauty of the Himalayan peaks by visiting Naldehra and Kufri. Visit Naldehra Golf Couse. Explore the wildlife at the Himalayan National Park. Later, get transferred to your hotel in Shimla for an overnight stay.

Stay: Stay at Deluxe hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.body:
Check out from the hotel in Shimla and get transferred to Delhi as your trip comes to an end.

Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

title: Dharamshala Dalhousie Combo Escape
description: Explore Dharamshala Dalhousie Combo Escape with scenic valleys, peaceful monasteries & mountain views. Perfect Himachal hill station getaway for couples and fam

itinerary.title: Delhi to Dharamshala | Visit Famous Attractions
itinerary.body:
Upon your arrival in Delhi, driver will pick you up from the predecided points & take you to Dharamshala. After reaching Dharamshala, visit the picturesque Dharamshala Cricket Stadium, one of the most beautiful stadiums in the world. Head towards Norbulingka Institute, a famous learning center of Tibetan culture. Afterward, visit the State War Memorial & pay tribute to brave soldiers. Post visit, check-in to your hotel in Dharamshala and have an overnight stay.

Dinner · Stay: Uno Grand · Transport: Transfer in Swift Dzire, Innova or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to McLeod Ganj | See Some Prominent Attractions
itinerary.body: Driver will pick you up and take you to McLeod Ganj for the excursion. Visit St. John Church which is situated amidst the dense jungle of McLeod Ganj. Then, roam around the famous Bhagsunath Temple & Bhagsunath Waterfalls. After this, head towards the beautiful Naddi Village & stroll through Dal Lake which is surrounded by deodar trees. Return to Dharamshala and visit Kangra Art Museum. Have an overnight stay in Dharamshala.

itinerary.title: Dharamshala to Dalhousie | Sightseeing Tour of Dalhousie
itinerary.body:
Post checkout, driver will pick you up and take you to Dalhousie for a sightseeing tour. Pass through the scenic route and see the majestic Dhauladhar Mountain Ranges. After reaching Dalhousie, check in to your hotel. In the evening, visit the beautiful Satdhara Waterfall & Panch Pulla Waterfalls and be amazed by the beautiful views of the surroundings. You can explore some famous churches in Dalhousie. Post sightseeing, have an overnight stay in Dalhousie.

Transport: Transfer in Swift Dzire, Innova or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to Khajjiar | Visit Mini Switzerland of India
itinerary.body:
Driver will pick you up from your hotel and take you on a sightseeing tour of Dalhousie. Roam around the Kalatop Wildlife Sanctuary and see wonderful flora & fauna. Then, visit the beautiful Chamera Lake where you can enjoy boating. Post sightseeing, proceed to Khajjiar for the excursion. Visit some famous places like Khajjiar Lake & the Khajji Nag Temple. Later, return to Dalhousie & visit some markets like The Mall in Gandhi Chowk. Have an overnight stay in Dalhousie.

Transport: Transfer in Swift Dzire, Innova or similar

itinerary.title: Departure from Dalhousie | Bid Adieu
itinerary.body:
Pack your bags and check out from your hotel in Dalhousie. Driver will pick you up from the hotel and take you to the predecided location in Delhi where your 5-day tour will end.

Transport: Transfer in Swift Dzire, Innova or similar

title: Romantic Shimla Manali Getaway
description: Romantic Shimla Manali Getaway with scenic views, cozy stays & snowfall vibes. Perfect Himachal trip for couples seeking love, peace & mountain charm.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Chandigarh I Transfer to Shimla | Day at Leisure
itinerary.body:
Upon arrival at Chandigarh Airport/Railway Station/Bus Stop, get transferred to Shimla. Upon reaching, check-in to your hotel and spend the rest of the day at leisure. You can visit the Himachal State Museum & admire its unique architecture and antique collections. Also, you can stroll through Lakkar Bazaar, known for its wooden handicrafts, or take in the serene beauty of Chadwick Waterfall. Later, return to your hotel on your own for a comfortable overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Stay at Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Sightseeing Tour of Shimla & Kufri
itinerary.body:
In the morning, get ready and board your transfer to explore Shimla and Kufri. Start with a visit to Jakhoo Hill, Shimla’s highest point, and home to the revered Hanuman Temple. Then, get driven to Kufri and explore the Himalayan Nature Park known for diverse wildlife like leopards and Himalayan monals. Later, get driven to Shimla and stroll along Mall Road while soaking in its bustling atmosphere. Also, explore other attractions before getting transferred to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Stay at Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer to Jibhi | Day at Leisure
itinerary.body:
In the morning, check-out from your Shimla hotel and get transferred to the scenic town of Jibhi. En route, pass through the stunning Jalori Pass, offering amazing views of the mountains and lush greenery. Upon arrival in Jibhi, check in at your hotel and relax for a while. Then, spend the rest of the day at leisure, where you can explore local landmarks like Serolsar Lake, a serene high-altitude lake. Later, return to your hotel on your own for a comfortable overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Stay at Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Sightseeing Tour of Jibhi I Transfer to Manali
itinerary.body:
Today, after check out, board your transfer for a sightseeing tour of Jibhi. Start with a visit to the cascading Jibhi Waterfall, a perfectly serene spot perfect to relax. Next, visit Mini Thailand and soak-in its tranquil vibe. Also, explore the historic Chehni Kothi, known for its unique architecture and panoramic views. Later, continue your journey to Manali. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and enjoy your overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Stay at Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Manali Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
In the morning, board your transfer for a sightseeing tour of Manali. Start with the Hidimba Temple and witness its distinctive pagoda style with a forest backdrop. Next, visit the Vashist Temple, where you can take a dip in its rejuvenating natural hot springs. Also, explore the Tibetan Monastery and soak-in its peaceful ambiance. Later, wander through Mall Road to visit the local shops and eateries. After an amazing day, get transferred to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Stay at Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to Solang Valley
itinerary.body:
On this day, board your transfer for an amazing excursion to Solang Valley. Upon reaching, dive into thrilling activities like zorbing, paragliding, and skiing against the backdrop of stunning mountain views (at an additional cost). Also, admire the scenic beauty of the surroundings before getting transferred back to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Stay at Deluxe Hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.body:
After a relaxing morning, check out of the hotel and get transferred to Chandigarh Airport / Railway Station / Bus Stop, marking the end of your unforgettable trip!

Breakfast · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

description: Explore Himachal Adventure Tour Manali Kasol Jibhi Kullu with scenic views, trekking, and riverside vibes. Perfect backpacking and adventure trip in Himachal.

itinerary.body:
Upon arrival at RK Ashram/Majnu ka Tilla, you will board an AC Volvo for an overnight journey to Manali. In the morning, wake up to the scenic views of the Himalayas surrounding you.

Stay: Uno Grand · Transport: Transfer in AC Volvo

During the tour, visit major attractions including the Hidimba Devi Temple, Vashist Kund, and the Tibetan Monastery, among others. itinerary.title: Transfer to Kasol via Solang Valley and Kullu
itinerary.body:

En route, stop at Solang Valley, where you can enjoy a variety of adventures, including ziplining, zorbing, paragliding, and many more thrilling activities. Continue your journey with another stop in Kullu, where you can visit a shawl factory and explore local crafts. Later, head towards Kasol, where upon arrival, you can check in at your hotel for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Jibhi | Enroute Stop at Manikaran | Jibhi Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
After you check out from your hotel in Kasol, you’ll be transferred to Jibhi. En route, visit Manikaran, famous for its hot water springs. Upon your arrival in Jibhi, board your transfer for a sightseeing tour, where you will explore attractions such as the Jibhi Waterfall, Mini Thailand and Chehni Kothi. After the tour, you will be driven to your hotel in Jibhi for check in and an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Trek to Serolsar Lake | Departure Day
itinerary.body:
After checking out from Jibhi, get transferred to Jalori Pass, where you’ll start a scenic trek to Serolsar Lake. This 6 km trek takes you through enchanting pine and deodar forests, beside the lake, and to the famous Budhi Nagin temple. After completing the trek, return to the starting point and board your transfer to the Aut Bus Stand. Upon arrival at the Aut Bus Stand, continue your journey to Delhi with an overnight ride in an AC Volvo, ensuring a comfortable travel experience.

Breakfast · Transport: Transfer in Tempo Traveller, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Day 6
Arrival in Delhi
itinerary.body:
By morning, you will reach Majnu ka Tilla Bus Stand in Delhi. From there you can continue with your onward journey. This marks the end of your trip. Have a safe journey ahead!

Transport: Transfer in AC Volvo

title: Shimla Manali Honeymoon Special Tour
description: Plan your Shimla Manali Honeymoon Special Tour with romantic stays, scenic views & cozy moments. Perfect Himachal escape for couples.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Manali | Overnight Journey
itinerary.body:
Head to the pickup point in Delhi and board your transfer to Manali. Enjoy your overnight journey. In the morning, wake up to breathtaking views of the Himalayas surrounding you, offering a scenic welcome as you near Manali.

Dinner · Transport: Transfer in AC Volvo

itinerary.title: Arrival in Manali | Manali Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
Upon your arrival in Manali, you'll be transferred to your hotel. Check in and later, get driven for Manali sightseeing tour. Begin with a visit to the Vashist Temple, known for its natural hot springs and traditional architecture, followed by the historic Hidimba Devi Temple and the serene Tibetan Monastery. Afterward, enjoy a leisurely stroll along the bustling Mall Road, where you can shop for souvenirs and local handicrafts. Later, you’ll be driven back to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch or Dinner · Stay: Stay at a Deluxe hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to Solang Valley
itinerary.body:
In the morning, you'll be driven for a scenic day trip to the stunning Solang Valley, situated just 14 km from Manali. Along the way, you'll pass through charming villages like Kothi, Gulaba, and Marhi, offering breathtaking views of snow-capped peaks and lush greenery. Upon reaching Solang Valley, indulge in thrilling activities such as zorbing, quad biking, and paragliding (at your own costs). Later, get transferred back to your hotel in Manali for an overnight stay.

Breakfast  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Stay at a Deluxe hotel · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to Manikaran & Kasol

Then, visit Manikaran and offer your respects at Gurudwara Manikaran Sahib. Afterwards, continue your journey to Manali, and upon arrival, check in at your hotel for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Manali Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
In the morning, board your transfer for a sightseeing tour of Manali. Start with the Hidimba Temple and witness its distinctive pagoda style with the background of the forest. Next, visit the Vashist Temple, where you can take a dip in its rejuvenating natural hot springs. Also, explore the Tibetan Monastery and soak-in its peaceful ambiance. Later, wander through Mall Road to visit the local shops and eateries. After an amazing day, get transferred to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast at  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Deluxe Hotel in Manali · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Excursion to Rohtang Pass and Solang Valley
itinerary.body:
In the morning, get ready and board your transfer for a thrilling day trip to Rohtang Pass and Solang Valley. Marvel at the breathtaking views of the Lahaul Valley as you ascend to Rohtang Pass and, upon reaching, soak-in the stunning views. Next, visit the Solang Valley, where you can partake in exhilarating activities like paragliding, zorbing, and ATV rides (additional costs apply). After an adventurous day, get transferred back to your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

Breakfast at  Lunch Or Dinner · Stay: Deluxe Hotel in Manali · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.body:
In the morning, get ready and check out from your hotel in Manali. Then, get driven to the Manali Bus Stand, from where you will board your bus to Delhi for an overnight journey. This marks the end to your amazing Himachal trip!

Breakfast · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

title: Dalhousie Dharamshala & Amritsar Himalayan Escape
description: Explore Dalhousie, Dharamshala & Amritsar with scenic mountains, peaceful monasteries, and the divine Golden Temple experience.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Amritsar | Visit to Wagah Border
itinerary.body:
Airport pickup and hotel checkWelcome to Amritsar! Upon arrival at the airport, you'll be driven to the hotel. After you check in, relax for some time. Later on, enjoy a visit to the Wagah Border. Witness the impressive Beating Retreat Ceremony, a daily spectacle that features a thrilling display of coordinated military marching, ceremonial flag-lowering, and patriotic presentations by the border guards. Later, get driven back to the hotel for an overnight stay.-in

itinerary.title: Amritsar Sightseeing Tour | Transfer to Dalhousie
itinerary.body:
In the morning, check out of the hotel and board your transfer for a sightseeing tour of Amritsar. Explore Golden Temple, known for its stunning golden facade and peaceful surroundings. Also, visit Durgiana Temple, known for its beautiful design and religious significance. After this, wander through Jallianwala Bagh, a poignant historical site that features the tragic massacre of 1919. Continue your journey to Dalhousie. Upon arrival, check in at the hotel for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Excursion to Khajjiar
itinerary.body:
Today, get ready for a wonderful excursion to Khajjiar. Board the transfer from the hotel, heading towards Khajjiar. Enroute, stop at Kalatop, offering views of the lush valley below. Also, visit Kalatop Wildlife Sanctuary, featuring diverse flora and fauna. Then, continue towards Khajjiar and upon arrival, visit Khajjiar Lake, known for its scenic beauty and surrounding meadows. Explore Khajji Nag Temple, known for its serene ambience. Later, get driven back to the hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch Or Dinner at Deluxe Hotel · Stay: Deluxe Hotel in Dalhousie · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Transfer to Dharamshala | Sightseeing Tour
itinerary.body:
In the morning, check out of the hotel and get driven to Dharamshala. Upon arrival, check in at the hotel and take some time to relax. After that, enjoy a sightseeing tour of the city. Explore Dharamshala Cricket Stadium, set against the stunning backdrop of the Himalayas. Also visit Dharamshala War Memorial, a site dedicated to the brave soldiers who sacrificed their lives for the country. Later, you'll be transferred back to the hotel for an overnight stay.

Breakfast Lunch Or Dinner at Deluxe Hotel · Stay: Deluxe Hotel in Dharamshala · Transport: Transfer in Sedan, SUV or similar

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Mcleod Ganj
itinerary.body:
In the morning, you'll be driven for a day trip to McLeod Ganj. During this journey, visit Naddi Village, known for its scenic views of the Dhauladhar Mountain Range. Also, explore St. John in the Wilderness Church, an example of Gothic architecture in the woods. Seek blessings at the Bhagsunath Temple, a Hindu shrine known for its sacred atmosphere and visit the Tibetan Monastery, full of vibrant prayer flags and ancient scriptures. Later, get driven back to the hotel for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Amritsar | Departure Day
itinerary.body:
After a relaxing morning, check out of the hotel in Dharamshala and get transferred to Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport in Amritsar for departure. This marks the end of your trip. Have a safe journey ahead!
